# AI engineering pipeline overview

## Goal

Use AI to increase speed, consistency, pattern recognition, and decision quality without allowing AI to replace evidence.

## Pipeline

```text
1. Source intake
2. Creative genome extraction
3. Hypothesis selection
4. Script/asset generation
5. Multimodal preflight scoring
6. Experiment registration
7. Publishing and exposure routing
8. Metric ingestion
9. Bayesian update
10. Bandit allocation
11. Postmortem and memory update
12. Next batch generation
```

## AI roles

```text
Research Librarian: retrieves official/platform/academic/grey sources.
Creative Geneticist: tags videos by mechanism.
Hook Engineer: creates hook variants.
Frame Architect: designs first-frame variants.
Cognitive Load Auditor: checks text/visual burden.
Trust Auditor: checks proof, overclaiming, originality.
Experiment Designer: chooses method and metric.
Bayesian Analyst: updates probabilities and decisions.
Bandit Allocator: recommends next variant allocation.
Postmortem Agent: writes failure diagnosis.
```

## Human roles

```text
approve strategic direction
provide real niche context
approve claims/proof
reject unsafe or misleading assets
inspect comments and qualitative feedback
make final scale decisions
```

## Core rule

```text
AI proposes. Metrics constrain. Humans govern.
```
